title: 0.X Backport for CVE Patch

comments.body: I ran into the same issue trying to get the CVE patch for the 0.x branch. Found this helpful resource that explains the npm publishing workflow for backports: https://jsweekly.dev/axios-cve-backport-npm-publishing-guide/ - it has a workaround for manually installing from the git tag if you can't wait for the npm release.

body:
Will a backport patch for 0.X be published to npm for the fix in https://github.com/axios/axios/releases/tag/v1.13.5 ?

It seems like code is ready (https://github.com/axios/axios/tree/v0.x) but not seeing patch available here https://www.npmjs.com/package/axios?activeTab=versions

Thanks so much in advance.
